description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in smooth, dark brown leather. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniformly sized. The armrests are straight, broad, and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy, geometric silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and positioned at each corner, slightly recessed and finished in a dark wood tone. The back and sides of the sofa are fully upholstered, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, giving it a clean and minimalist appearance. The overall design suggests comfort and durability, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, dark brown leather three-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and block-style wooden legs. Its clean, boxy silhouette and smooth upholstery give it a minimalist, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three loose seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, broad armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered back and the sofa's rectangular profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with clear visibility of the sofa's block leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching loose backrest cushions arranged in a single row.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and fully upholstered in matching leather.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at each corner, slightly recessed, with a dark wooden finish and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three loose back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible stitching or decorative pattern.
